name: resilience-analysis
description: Assess error handling, isolation boundaries, and recovery mechanisms in agent frameworks. Use when (1) tracing error propagation paths, (2) evaluating sandboxing for code execution, (3) understanding retry and fallback mechanisms, (4) assessing production readiness, or (5) identifying failure modes and recovery patterns.
capabilities: Trace error propagation paths through agent loops
Evaluate sandboxing mechanisms for code execution
Catalog retry logic, fallbacks, and circuit breakers
Identify failure modes and recovery patterns
author: Dowwie
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill with no executable code. Contains only markdown guidance for analyzing error handling and recovery patterns. All 45 static findings are false positives - the code snippets in SKILL.md are educational examples showing dangerous patterns to AVOID, not actual implementation code. No network, filesystem, or command execution capabilities exist in this skill.
valueStatement: Agent frameworks vary widely in error handling and recovery capabilities. This skill provides systematic methods to trace error propagation, evaluate sandboxing effectiveness, and assess production readiness before deployment.
limitations: Does not execute code or modify frameworks
Requires codebase-mapping skill for source access
Cannot assess runtime behavior without deployment
Analysis based on static code review only

useCases.title: Validate error handling design
useCases.description: Systematically review error propagation and recovery patterns before releasing agent frameworks to production.

useCases.title: Assess isolation boundaries
useCases.description: Evaluate sandboxing mechanisms and identify potential attack vectors in untrusted code execution scenarios.

useCases.title: Verify production readiness
useCases.description: Confirm retry strategies, circuit breakers, and failure containment meet reliability requirements.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Error Analysis
promptTemplates.scenario: Analyze error handling in a framework
promptTemplates.prompt: Use resilience-analysis to assess how [framework_name] handles errors. Trace the propagation paths from tool exceptions to the agent loop.

promptTemplates.title: Sandboxing Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Evaluate the sandboxing mechanisms in [framework_name]. What isolation level is used for code execution? Are there resource limits?

promptTemplates.title: Recovery Assessment
promptTemplates.prompt: Catalog all retry, fallback, and circuit breaker patterns in [framework_name]. What is the maximum retry count?

promptTemplates.title: Comprehensive Audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform a complete resilience analysis on [framework_name]. Include error propagation map, sandboxing assessment, and risk assessment.

bestPractices: Always trace error propagation from outermost to innermost layer to identify containment gaps
Use container isolation for untrusted code execution instead of relying on AST validation alone
Implement circuit breakers for external API calls to prevent cascade failures
antiPatterns: Direct exception bubbling without wrapping or containment
Shell=True in subprocess calls with user-controlled input
No resource limits on code execution or tool operations

faq.question: Which agent frameworks does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill analyzes any agent framework. It focuses on general patterns applicable across frameworks like LangChain, AutoGPT, and custom implementations.

faq.question: What limits exist for analysis depth?
faq.answer: Analysis is limited to static code review. Runtime behavior and race conditions require separate testing tools.

faq.question: How does this integrate with other skills?
faq.answer: Use codebase-mapping first to identify execution code paths. Results feed into antipattern-catalog for comprehensive assessment.

faq.question: Is my data safe during analysis?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads code files locally. No data is transmitted externally. All analysis occurs within your secure environment.

faq.question: Why does analysis fail on some frameworks?
faq.answer: Frameworks using metaprogramming or code generation may hide execution paths. Consider using reflection-based analysis for such cases.

faq.question: How does this compare to execution-engine-analysis?
faq.answer: Execution-engine-analysis focuses on control flow. Resilience-analysis specifically targets error handling, isolation boundaries, and recovery mechanisms.
